'''''Bungo n' Rusti''''' was a series of short comics. The first story, ''[[Bungo n' Rusti Get Carry-Out]]'', was published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 11|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 11]]. Several more stories were later published unofficially online at [[TheForce.net]].<ref name="TFN">{{WebCite|url=https://www.theforce.net/comics/fancomics/bungo&rusti/index.shtml|text=Bungo and Rusti Star Wars Comics!|author=[[James Anderson]]|work=[[TheForce.net]]|archivedate=20210725123043}}</ref>
